headline: Exxon’s Move to Texas and Shareholder Votes Might Change The Case For Investing In Exxon Mobil (XOM)
summary: In May 2026, Exxon Mobil Corporation held its annual shareholder meeting, where investors approved relocating the company’s legal home from New Jersey to Texas while rejecting proposals to modify its retail voting program and require an independent board chair. This move to Texas, viewed as a shift to a jurisdiction with comparatively less robust shareholder rights, raises fresh questions about how Exxon Mobil balances governance, investor influence, and operational flexibility. We’ll now...
